name: Curried Peachtree Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless pork leg cutlets, 1/4 inch thick
1/2 cup coarsely chopped fresh or canned peaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add cutlets and onion to the skillet.
3. Sauté pork quickly, about 2 minutes per side, until golden brown.
4. In a medium bowl, stir together remaining ingredients: chicken broth, curry powder, cornstarch, seasoned salt, peaches, and peach jam.
5. Pour the mixture over the pork cutlets.
6. Cook and stir gently over low heat until the sauce thickens, about 8-10 minutes.
Source:
"National Pork Producers Council"
http://www.nppc.org
